rows.label: tev015501_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev015501_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Kaisis about the architecture of NLA.

rows.label: tev015501_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev015501_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Kaisis if anything is troubling him.

rows.label: tev015501_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Kaisis about Ma-non technology.

rows.label: tev015501_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Kaisis about the damage from the enemy attack.

rows.label: tev015501_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Kaisis about the city of NLA.

rows.label: tev015501_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Kaisis about recent developments.

rows.label: tev015501_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Kaisis about recent developments.

rows.label: tev015501_SEL3021
rows.name: Ask Kaisis about recent developments.

rows.label: tev015501_MSG0001
rows.name:
You want to know why this city's only
half built? Well, even if you do know,
I'm going to tell you again![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015501_MSG0002
rows.name:
When humanity set off for the heavens, the
plan was that the city would be constructed
while we were on board the White Whale.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015501_MSG0003
rows.name:
If they had built it when they were
building the ship itself, there's no
way we could have taken off on time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015501_MSG0004
rows.name:
So after we left Earth,
construction of the residential
unit, or "Habitat," began.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015501_MSG0005
rows.name:
Everything was peachy until we got
shot down by xenos and had to land
the unfinished Habitat here on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015501_MSG0006
rows.name:
Berry says I'm the world's biggest architecture
nerd, so yeah, I could go on like this all
day. Let's continue it next time, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015501_MSG0008
rows.name:
When I stand here, I sometimes hear
an unsettling, bestial squealing.
I always wondered what it was.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015501_MSG0009
rows.name:
Well, it turns out that a group of indigens are
doing a concentrated attack on the north side of
the outer wall—that's right beyond this wall here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015501_MSG0010
rows.name:
Don't worry, though—there's no way that
mere beasts are going to break through
a wall built with human ingenuity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015501_MSG0011
rows.name:
Nevertheless, we can't just
ignore it forever. I want the
damn things eradicated already![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015501_MSG0012
rows.name:
What in the hell are the Interceptor doing? Isn't
intercepting threats supposed to be their Union's
responsibility? It's in the name and everything![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015501_MSG0015
rows.name:
If you want to talk about Ma-non
technology, look no further than
that incredible ship of theirs.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015501_MSG0016
rows.name:
I asked some Ma-non how it works,
and they said maybe they'd tell me
if I took them out for pizza.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015501_MSG0017
rows.name:
I went ahead and shelled out for 32 large
pies, but their answer was so abstruse
that I couldn't understand any of it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015501_MSG0018
rows.name:
Berry says I'm the world's biggest architecture nerd.
So while that ship may not be a building, I still want
to be capable of understanding how they made it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015501_MSG0025
rows.name:
It looks like they've already
finished repairing the damage that
the buildings took in the attack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015501_MSG0026
rows.name:
Unfortunately, the resources they had to use
to do it came out of the supply that had
been earmarked for the completion of NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015501_MSG0027
rows.name:
So now the city is another step away from being
finished. And as the world's biggest architecture
nerd— according to Berry—I want to see a completed NLA![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015501_MSG0028
rows.name:
So I want you BLADEs to work hard to
make that happen, all right? And remember
that I'll support you however I can.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015501_MSG0035
rows.name:
When we locate the Central Life, we can
finally resume city-building the way the
Earthlife Colonization Project intended it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015501_MSG0036
rows.name:
Then we can finally say good-bye to all these
unsightly gaps throughout the city. If you wanted
to jump through them, this could be your last chance![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015501_MSG0037
rows.name:
This is just between us, but when the
city's finally complete, I plan to ask
Berry to start a family with me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015501_MSG0038
rows.name:
A new city, a new family, and a
brand-new world! Let's both do what
we must to make this dream come true.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015501_MSG1013
rows.name:
I heard a BLADE finally exterminated
the indigens that were congregating
near the northern outer wall.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015501_MSG1014
rows.name:
His name was...Carl, I think? Yes,
that sounds right. Regardless, I commend
his efforts to protect our city![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015501_MSG1015
rows.name:
We can't stand idly by while
evil beings try to damage this
great structure of ours.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015501_MSG1016
rows.name:
This Carl understands what it
means to perform one's duties![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015501_MSG2017
rows.name:
I heard a softhearted BLADE was overcome with
emotion and decided to spare the wretched indigens
that congregate near the northern outer wall.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015501_MSG2018
rows.name:
I think his name was...Carl?
But whatever it is, he should
resign from BLADE immediately![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015501_MSG2019
rows.name:
No creature who dares to damage
this incredible structure
should be shown any mercy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015501_MSG2020
rows.name:
Does this Carl character even
understand the degree to which
he violated his duty?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015501_MSG0021
rows.name:
I heard the BLADE who spared the indigens
that congregate near the northern outer
wall was killed by those same indigens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015501_MSG0022
rows.name:
I think his name was Carl? Regardless, he showed
nothing but mercy to the wretched creatures
that dared to damage this city, and yet...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015501_MSG0023
rows.name:
Well, I'm not saying he didn't have it coming,
but he IS a warrior who died in defense of the
city, and I will honor his memory accordingly.[ST:wait ]
